settings.title: Crafted for Effortless Speed
settings.description: Hyperion Titanium II, Power Frame 2.0, and high-repulsion face technology deliver pure energy transfer with every strike.

settings.title: Stability in Every Swing
settings.description: Full Tungsten Sole construction and Optimal Core Impact design ensure consistent launch, forgiveness, and control.

settings.title: Ultra-Light Precision
settings.description: LV770 and TL770 carbon shafts engineered for smooth acceleration, refined tempo, and unmatched feel through impact.

settings.title: Prestigio 14
settings.hero_eyebrow: Majesty Golf USA · Available at Northcrest
settings.hero_sub2: Available at Northcrest Golf · Atlanta, GA
settings.intro_body: Majesty's Prestigio 14 series represents the marriage of hand-finished detail and material science — engineered for golfers who value precision, refinement, and effortless speed. Northcrest is honored to present this rare collection.
settings.excl_text: Majesty selects only a handful of retailers worldwide to represent the Prestigio line. Northcrest is one of nine locations in the United States entrusted with this collection. Our team offers personalized guidance to help you experience the full performance of these handcrafted clubs.
settings.cta_sub: Schedule a private consultation with our team. Discover the ease, balance, and precision that define Majesty's newest flagship series.
settings.collection_sub: Select a club below to learn more
